authority: European Data Protection Board (EDPB) / National DPAs

controls.description: All personal data processing must have a documented lawful basis and be communicated transparently to data subjects.
controls.logic: FAIL if any processing_activity record has lawful_basis = NULL or if privacy_notice_provided = FALSE for data collected from EU subjects.

controls.description: Personal data must be collected for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes and not further processed in an incompatible manner.
controls.logic: FAIL if any data processing activity uses personal data for purposes not listed in the original processing_purpose_statement, or if secondary_purpose_documented = FALSE.

controls.description: Only personal data adequate, relevant, and limited to what is necessary must be collected.
controls.logic: FAIL if any data_field in the collection schema has collection_justification = NULL or if unnecessary_field_flag = TRUE.

controls.description: Personal data must be accurate and, where necessary, kept up to date. Inaccurate data must be erased or rectified without delay.
controls.logic: FAIL if any personal data record has data_accuracy_verified = FALSE, or if last_data_quality_check is older than 12 months for actively used data.

controls.description: Personal data must not be kept in identifiable form longer than necessary for the processing purpose.
controls.logic: FAIL if any personal data record has created_date older than retention_period_days AND deletion_status NOT IN ('DELETED','ANONYMIZED','PSEUDONYMIZED').

controls.description: Personal data must be processed with appropriate security against unauthorized access, loss, or damage.
controls.logic: FAIL if any personal data store has encryption_at_rest = FALSE or access_control_enabled = FALSE.

controls.description: Where consent is the lawful basis, it must be documented, freely given, specific, informed, and withdrawable.
controls.logic: FAIL if any consent record is missing consent_timestamp, consent_version, or consent_withdrawal_mechanism, or if consent was pre-ticked.

controls.requirement: Privacy Notice Provided at Point of Collection
controls.description: Data subjects must receive privacy information at the point of data collection including controller identity, processing purposes, and rights.
controls.logic: FAIL if any data collection event has no linked privacy_notice_version, or if privacy_notice_presented = FALSE.

controls.description: When a data subject exercises the right to erasure and no overriding legitimate grounds exist, data must be erased within 30 days.
controls.logic: FAIL if any erasure_request record has status = 'PENDING' and request_date is more than 30 days ago, or if erasure_completed_date - request_date > 30.

controls.requirement: Data Portability Requests Fulfilled in Machine-Readable Format
controls.description: Data subjects have the right to receive their personal data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format.
controls.logic: FAIL if any portability_request has fulfillment_format NOT IN ('JSON','CSV','XML'), or if request_fulfillment_date is NULL for requests older than 30 days.

controls.requirement: Data Protection by Design and by Default
controls.description: Privacy safeguards must be integrated into system design. Only minimum necessary data should be processed by default.
controls.logic: FAIL if any new system or feature deployed in the last 12 months has dpia_conducted = FALSE, or if default_data_scope exceeds minimum_necessary_scope.

controls.description: Controllers and processors must maintain a comprehensive record of processing activities.
controls.logic: FAIL if any active data processing activity has no corresponding ROPA entry, or if ROPA record lacks controller_name, purpose, data_categories, or recipients.

controls.description: Technical measures including pseudonymization and encryption must be implemented where appropriate to protect personal data.
controls.logic: FAIL if any personal data table has encryption_enabled = FALSE or if sensitive_field_flag = TRUE but pseudonymization_applied = FALSE.

controls.requirement: Security Measures Regularly Tested and Evaluated
controls.description: A process for regularly testing, assessing, and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organizational security measures must exist.
controls.logic: FAIL if no security_test record exists for the current quarter, or if penetration_test_date is older than 12 months for systems processing sensitive data.

controls.requirement: Supervisory Authority Notified of Breach Within 72 Hours
controls.description: Personal data breaches likely to result in risk to individuals must be notified to the supervisory authority within 72 hours of becoming aware.
controls.logic: FAIL if any data_breach record has supervisory_authority_notified = FALSE and hours_since_detection > 72, or if risk_to_individuals = TRUE but notification_sent = FALSE.

controls.requirement: Data Protection Impact Assessment for High-Risk Processing
controls.description: A DPIA must be carried out before processing that is likely to result in a high risk to individuals.
controls.logic: FAIL if any high_risk_processing_activity record has dpia_status = 'NOT_CONDUCTED' or if dpia_date is older than 36 months.

controls.requirement: Data Processing Agreements with All Processors
controls.description: All data processors must be bound by a Data Processing Agreement imposing appropriate data protection obligations.
controls.logic: FAIL if any vendor record with processor_type = 'DATA_PROCESSOR' and jurisdiction = 'EU' has no DPA, or if DPA lacks required clauses on security measures and sub-processor controls.

controls.requirement: Adequate Transfer Mechanisms for Third-Country Transfers
controls.description: Transfers of personal data to third countries must be based on an adequacy decision, standard contractual clauses, or other approved mechanisms.
controls.logic: FAIL if any data_transfer record has destination_country NOT IN adequate_countries_list AND transfer_mechanism = NULL or transfer_mechanism NOT IN ('SCC','BCR','ADEQUACY_DECISION','DEROGATION').
